x-enumeration-literals.name: Ordinary
x-enumeration-literals.description: Ordinary check, typically carried out on standard accounts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Simple
x-enumeration-literals.description: Simple check, typically carried out on accounts that have a low risk of anti-money laundering, such as an account owned by a financial institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Enhanced
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enhanced check, typically carried out on accounts that are considered high risk.
